case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. TYERECE JACKSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, TYERECE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$105.00); (PROOF OF SERVICE FORWARDED TO DEPT 506) SERVED OCT-13-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, TYERECE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEVEN ADELSEN, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE, REPRESETNED BY STEVEN ADELSEN, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TYRECE JACKSON IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JACKSON, TYERECE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
